vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on /var/log/messages File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /var/log/messages, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0600 /var/log/messages
vulnerability.group: Verify Permissions on Files within /var/log Directory

triage_decision.reason: Changing the permission of a log file to 0600 is a standard STIG hardening step that does not affect authentication, networking, or critical services. The remediation is a single chmod command, low risk of lockout or system breakage.
